info.title: LV Monitoring device APIs
info.description:
## Contains GET only APIs to retrieve interval data.
### Note : This APIs support "API token based request"

get.summary: Returns device details based on the API Key
get.description:
**The below table defines the output response this API returns**
| Name             | Description                                    |
| ---------------- | -----------------------------------------------|
| serialid         | unique id of device.               |
| Transformer Id   | If the request is not valid.                   |
| kva_rating       | KVA rating for the threshold.                  |
| circuit_config   | Circuit Configuration                          |
|                  | **a** - Single Phase -  1 current              |
|                  | **b** - Single Phase 2 current - Line to Neutral (center tapped)|
|                  | **c** - Single Phase 2 current - Line and Line |
|                  | **d** - Three Phase - 3 Currents Delta         |
|                   | **e** - Three Phase- 3 Currents, Wye          |                       
| temperature_rating| Temprature Rating for transformers.           |
| voltage_rating   | Voltage Rating.                                |
| energization_date| When device started reporting.                 |
| vnom             | Nominal Load Side Voltage.                     |
| underloadthreshold| Under threshold rating to report on portal.   |
| criticalloadthreshold| Critical threshold rating to report on portal.|
| overloadthreshold| Over threshold rating to report on portal.     |
| pole_number      | Pole device is installed.                      |
| substation       | Area the  device is installed.                 |
| location         | Sector/street device is installed.             |
| mounting         | Mount type on pole.                            |
| lat              | Latitude .                                     |
| lng              | Longitude.                                     |

parameters.name: device_serialid
parameters.description: (optional) Returns details based on the device serial provided. Remove the parameter if you want to list entire fleet of devices you have access to

get.summary: Returns event details based on the device_serialid provided within the time stamps
get.description:
**The below table defines the output response this API returns**
| Name             | Description                                    |
| ---------------- | -----------------------------------------------|
| epochtime         | Unix time stamp in seconds of the date/time when data was received.               |
| type   | An Enum describing the type of monitoring data that was sent by the device.                   |
| value       | Contains a list of json. Each Json represents a device channel or phase and contains key value pair of the monitoring parameters.|
||
|Tag| Description|
| ----------------  | -----------------------------------------------|
|34|  Frequency, voltage, and current is out of range or static reading|
|97|  Voltage reading has exceeded under voltage warning threshold event|
|99|  Voltage reading has exceeded over voltage warning threshold event|
|101|  Voltage reading has exceeded vsag threshold event|
|102|  Voltage reading has exceeded vswell threshold event|
|103|  Voltage reading has exceeded vflicker threshold event|
|104|  Voltage reading has exceeded no voltage threshold event|
|105|  Voltage reading has exceeded imbalance threshold with other phase voltage|
|106|  VTHD reading has exceeded max VTHD threshold event|
|108|  Lower RVC event|
|109|  Upper RVC event|
|129|  Current reading has exceeded no current threshold event|
|130|  Current reading has exceeded over current warning threshold event|
|132|  Negative current is detected|
|134|  Power good is detected|
|136|  Peak demand alert detected|
|137|  Current reading has exceeded imbalance threshold with other phase current|
|138|  ITHD reading has exceeded max ITHD threshold event|
|161|  PF reading has exceeded under PF warning threshold event|
|163|  Power reading has exceeded power overload warning threshold event|
|166|  Confirmed Power Outage (30sec power confirmation check)|
|167|  Power Interruption (Loss of Supply)|
|193|  Frequency reading has exceeded under frequency warning threshold event|
|195|  Frequency reading has exceeded over frequency warning threshold event|
|111|  Loss of phase voltage |
|112|  Partial voltage loss|

parameters.name: device_serialid
parameters.description: Returns events based on the device serial provided.

parameters.name: starttime
parameters.description: Start time range of the search in epoch, Convert human-readable time to epoch using [Epoch Converter](https://www.epochconverter.com/).

parameters.name: endtime
parameters.description: End time range of the search in epoch, Convert human-readable time to epoch using [Epoch Converter](https://www.epochconverter.com/).

get.summary: Returns all devices based on the tags provided within the time stamps
get.description:
**The below table defines the output response this API returns**
| Name              | Description                                    |
| ----------------  | -----------------------------------------------|
| epochtime         | Unix time stamp in seconds of the date/time when data was received.             |
| value             | Contains a list of json. Each Json represents a device channel or phase and contains key value pair of the monitoring parameters|.
|serialid           | device unique id |
|transformer_id    | unique id the transformer |
|feeder             | Feeder id the transformer is connected to |
|Sub Station        | Feeder connected to which substation |
||
|Tag| Description|
| ----------------  | -----------------------------------------------|
|34|  Frequency, voltage, and current is out of range or static reading|
|97|  Voltage reading has exceeded under voltage warning threshold event|
|99|  Voltage reading has exceeded over voltage warning threshold event|
|101|  Voltage reading has exceeded vsag threshold event|
|102|  Voltage reading has exceeded vswell threshold event|
|103|  Voltage reading has exceeded vflicker threshold event|
|104|  Voltage reading has exceeded no voltage threshold event|
|105|  Voltage reading has exceeded imbalance threshold with other phase voltage|
|106|  VTHD reading has exceeded max VTHD threshold event|
|108|  Lower RVC event|
|109|  Upper RVC event|
|129|  Current reading has exceeded no current threshold event|
|130|  Current reading has exceeded over current warning threshold event|
|132|  Negative current is detected|
|134|  Power good is detected|
|136|  Peak demand alert detected|
|137|  Current reading has exceeded imbalance threshold with other phase current|
|138|  ITHD reading has exceeded max ITHD threshold event|
|161|  PF reading has exceeded under PF warning threshold event|
|163|  Power reading has exceeded power overload warning threshold event|
|166|  Confirmed Power Outage (30sec power confirmation check)|
|167|  Power Interruption (Loss of Supply)|
|193|  Frequency reading has exceeded under frequency warning threshold event|
|195|  Frequency reading has exceeded over frequency warning threshold event|
|111|  Loss of phase voltage |
|112|  Partial voltage loss|

parameters.name: starttime
parameters.description: Start time range of the search in epoch, Convert human-readable time to epoch using [Epoch Converter](https://www.epochconverter.com/).

parameters.name: endtime
parameters.description: End time range of the search in epoch, Convert human-readable time to epoch using [Epoch Converter](https://www.epochconverter.com/).

get.summary: Returns live power quality based on the serialid provided
get.description:
**The below table defines the output response this API returns**
| Name              | Description                                    |
| ----------------  | -----------------------------------------------|
| epoch         | Unix time stamp in seconds of the date/time when data was received.             |
| phase             |  Channel Readout (phase0 = Channel1; phase1 = Channel2; phase2 = Channel3; phase3 = General Parameters applicable to all Channels)|
|watt           | Active Power from the channel (1/2/3) |
|va    | Apparent Power from the channel (1/2/3) |
|var             | Reactive Power from the channel (1/2/3) |
|pf        | Power Factor from the channel (1/2/3) |
|vrms        | VAVE = 1-minute average of the Voltage RMS reading |
|vthd        | Line Voltage Total Harmonic Distortion |
|vharm        | Feeder connected to which substation |
|irms        | IAVE = 1-minute average of the Current RMS reading |
|ithd        | Line Current Total Harmonic Distortion |
|iharm        | Line Current Harmonic Component |
|irms_min | 1-minute min of the Current RMS reading|
|irms_max | 1-minute max of the Current RMS reading |
|vrms_min | 1-minute min of the Voltage RMS reading|
|vrms_max | 1-minute max of the Voltage RMS reading| 
|Linefreq        | Line Frequency |

get.summary: Returns power quality data based on the provided serialid and the time stamps
get.description:
**The below table defines the output response this API returns**
| Name              | Description                                    |
| ----------------  | -----------------------------------------------|
| epoch         | Unix time stamp in seconds of the date/time when data was received.             |
| phase             |  Channel Readout (phase0 = Channel1; phase1 = Channel2; phase2 = Channel3; phase3 = General Parameters applicable to all Channels)|
|watt           | Active Power from the channel (1/2/3) |
|va    | Apparent Power from the channel (1/2/3) |
|var             | Reactive Power from the channel (1/2/3) |
|pf        | Power Factor from the channel (1/2/3) |
|vrms        | VAVE = 1-minute average of the Voltage RMS reading |
|vthd        | Line Voltage Total Harmonic Distortion |
|vharm        | Feeder connected to which substation |
|irms        | IAVE = 1-minute average of the Current RMS reading |
|ithd        | Line Current Total Harmonic Distortion |
|iharm        | Line Current Harmonic Component |
|irms_min | 1-minute min of the Current RMS reading|
|irms_max | 1-minute max of the Current RMS reading |
|vrms_min | 1-minute min of the Voltage RMS reading|
|vrms_max | 1-minute max of the Voltage RMS reading| 
|Linefreq        | Line Frequency |

get.summary: Returns harmonics data based on the provided serialid and the time stamps
get.description:
**The below table defines the output response this API returns**
| Name              | Description                                    |
| ----------------  | -----------------------------------------------|
| epoch         | Unix time stamp in seconds of the date/time when data was received.             |
| phase             |  Channel Readout (phase0 = Channel1; phase1 = Channel2; phase2 = Channel3; phase3 = General Parameters applicable to all Channels)|
|vharm        | Total voltage  harmonics |
|iharm        | Totcal current harmonics |
|vharm1- vharm21        | induvidual harmonics |
|iharm1- iharm21        | induvidual harmonics |
